difficulty.rationale: Requires recovering from a malformed public artifact while preserving workspace evidence.

visible_prompt: Repair the run evidence so the public checker artifact is well-formed after the source fix.
visible_acceptance_criteria: The public checker artifact is present and parseable.

expected_mutation_policy.summary: Source and public evidence artifact repair are allowed; tests must remain unchanged.

visible_checks.summary: Run the focused visible recovery test.

hidden_checks.summary: Confirm missing or malformed public artifacts fail independent of workspace bytes.
hidden_checks.scorer_rubric: Reject completion when the required checker verdict artifact is missing or malformed, even if source bytes look correct.
